pi_items.source: Task instructions and export_result.sh explicitly require this path.
Task instructions explicitly specify this name.
Task instructions explicitly specify these initials.
Task instructions explicitly specify this group.

Task instructions request 'Type: Work'. Code analysis of the mpxj library (net.sf.mpxj.ResourceType) and MS Project XML schema confirms that 'Work' is represented by type code 1, while 0 represents 'Material'.

Code analysis of the base sample_project.xml reveals it already contains 34 resources. Adding 1 new resource results in an expected minimum count of 35. The claimed metadata value of 8 is a fabricated, arbitrarily low threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic sample project that already contains 34 resources. Adding the new Work resource ('Helena Torres', initials 'HT', group 'Engineering', standard rate 110.0, overtime rate 165.0) to this project results in an expected total of 35 resources. The requested 'Work' resource type corresponds to MS Project XML type code 1, contradicting the metadata claim of 0 (which maps to 'Material'). The final XML file must be exported to /home/ga/Projects/updated_project.xml.
